narrative:
Trotwood 3-B (precinct in Montgomery County) has 861 registered voters, with 57.3% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 22.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 20.7%, a narrow Republican lean of 1.4 percentage points.
